studies.title: Prospective randomised study on multimodal self-treatment of women with incontinence complaints using a digital health application
studies.brief_summary: Kranus Health GmbH is conducting this study to investigate problems of urinary incontinence in women. The purpose of the study is to evaluate the impact of digital therapy on patients with this problem. As part of the study, patients diagnosed with this symptom will be given access to digital therapy using the Kranus Mictera app.
